title: Lead SEO Specialist at Shyaway Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Lead SEO Specialist at Shyaway Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Shyaway Digital Technologies invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Dhanbad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Shyaway Digital Technologies:
Shyaway Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shyaway Digital Technologies!
